title: Disk & Partition Management
html:
Disk & Partition Management

Contents

  • Partitioning
  • LVM (logical volumes)
  • Disk health / wipe
  • Disk images

Partitioning

CommandDescription
 
lsblk
block device tree
fdisk -l /dev/sda
list partitions (MBR/GPT)
fdisk /dev/sdb
interactive partition editor
parted /dev/sdb print
show partition table
parted /dev/sdb mklabel gpt
create GPT label
parted /dev/sdb mkpart primary ext4 1MiB 100%
create one partition filling the disk
partprobe /dev/sdb
re-read partition table without reboot
cfdisk /dev/sdb
ncurses partition editor

LVM (logical volumes)

CommandDescription
 
pvs / pvdisplay
physical volumes
vgs / vgdisplay
volume groups
lvs / lvdisplay
logical volumes
pvcreate /dev/sdb1
vgcreate data /dev/sdb1
lvcreate -L 50G -n backups data
50 GB LV named 'backups' in vg 'data'
lvextend -L +10G -r /dev/data/backups
grow + resize FS

Disk health / wipe

CommandDescription
 
smartctl -a /dev/sda
S.M.A.R.T. status
badblocks -sv /dev/sdb
read-only surface scan
dd if=/dev/zero of=/dev/sdb bs=4M status=progress
wipe disk (DANGEROUS)
shred -vn 1 -z /dev/sdb
1 random pass + zero (slower wipe)
wipefs -a /dev/sdb
wipe FS signatures (quick)

Disk images

CommandDescription
 
dd if=/dev/sdb of=disk.img bs=4M status=progress
raw image of disk
dd if=Kali.iso of=/dev/sdb bs=4M status=progress oflag=sync
write ISO to USB
qemu-img info disk.qcow2
show qcow2 metadata
qemu-img convert -f qcow2 -O raw in.qcow2 out.img
convert formats
